message:
refactor: rename test functions for clarity and add explicit integer type annotations

gc_pause.rs:
- Rename 5 test functions to be more descriptive and avoid collisions
  with future test enrichment batches:
  - pause_budget_serde_roundtrip → pause_budget_custom_serde_roundtrip
  - pause_record_serde_roundtrip → pause_record_full_serde_roundtrip
  - budget_violation_serde_roundtrip → budget_violation_full_serde_roundtrip
  - percentile_snapshot_serde_roundtrip → percentile_snapshot_full_serde_roundtrip
  - tracker_extensions_deterministic_order → tracker_extensions_btree_alphabetical_order

runtime_diagnostics_cli.rs:
- Add explicit u64 type annotation to baseline_risk_millionths binding
  and u64 suffixes to match arm literals (100_000_u64, 400_000_u64,
  700_000_u64) for type inference clarity in the onboarding scorecard
  risk calculation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
